Judge Dredd's iconic uniform and weaponry communicate authority status and role throughout gameplay

attack patterns, patrol behaviors indicating non-compliance with Judge authority

notes: Judge Dredd SNES is a 1995 action platformer based on the 1995 Stallone film adaptation of the 2000 AD comic character. Sources provide limited detail on visual communication systems; extraction based on genre conventions (action platformer) and licensed film IP context. Game communicates through character sprite identity (Judge uniform), enemy type differentiation (criminal variants), and environmental setting (Mega City dystopia). No detailed documentation available on specific color coding, HUD elements, or sophisticated visual state-machine design. Tier T3 assessment limits to qualitative observation of probable visual language patterns.
